programme.title: Griff's Great Kiwi Road Trip (S1)
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones' journey across NZ using only the back roads sees him travel from Queenstown, over The Remarkables, and finishes his trip at the very tip of the country, Bluff.

programme.title: The First of Us
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of how the human species, Homo sapiens, first emerged, where the discoveries of recent years are revolutionising the understanding of humanity's origin story.

programme.title: Healthy Inside
programme.desc: Dr Michael Mosley tries to learn the secrets behind staying healthy. He examines ways that people can make their bodies better at fighting infection and sickness.

programme.title: Secrets of the Superfactories (S2)
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes with Coca Cola Zero Sugar as they produce 1 billion litres of the iconic drink. A Finnish company revolutionizes the propulsion system that propels a cruise ship. Plus the USA cook up a storm and a classic British motorcycle rolls off the production line every 45 seconds in India.

programme.title: The Case Of The Empty Swapsie Wagon
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun - until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unhappy Unicorn
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug.

programme.title: The Case Of The Sticker Mystery
programme.desc: New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate. He finds himself going head to head with jealous Hoof who wants to prove that Noddy isn't the only investigator in Toyland. Hoof thinks he's solved the case in no time, but Noddy's attention to detail makes him realise the bandit isn't quite what he seems.

programme.title: The Case Of The Stolen Treasure
programme.desc: The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt. Later that day, the pirate treasure disappears! Oh no! Noddy needs to investigate at once. A strange new galleon appears on the horizon. Could it be Tina the Terrible? Has she stolen the treasure? Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all.

programme.title: Why Parrot Can't Keep A Secret
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Parrot was the best keeper of secrets in the whole of Tinga Tinga. Infact Parrot couldn't open his beak at all! Then one day some beast dares to steal Lion's mane and Parrot sees the whole thing! But how is going to tell Lion?! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Bushbaby Has Big Eyes
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Bushbaby didn't have big eyes. She had tiny little eyes and she was always getting lost. Strange things begin to happen and there are stories that Majitu the Great Giant has returned to Tinga Tinga. Young Bushbaby doesn't believe a word of it... and convinces the other animals that Majitu the Giant does not exist. "If you can't see him, he's not real". But then she does see the Giant and her eyes grow big as planets. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Winter Games
programme.desc: The children are excited as there's a big Winter Snowdown on the fells.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Bucking Bronco
programme.desc: Hopes are high for this evening's hoe-down on Greendale's village green - especially among PC Selby and Ted, who each harbour hopes of dancing with Dr Gilbertson. Pat's mission is to deliver one of Ted's inventions, a mechanical horse or "bucking bronco", to the event. But when the bronco is accidentally switched on in the back of Pat's van, it rolls away and Pat can't find a way to recapture it. He enlists Amy's help, but jealous Pumpkin pushes the bronco away, making matters worse.

programme.title: Homesick Tin Top
programme.desc: Tin Top just can't master corners no matter how hard he tries. The other cars try to help him to no avail… until Roary hits on a brilliant plan.

programme.title: Save Our Tree
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is planning on cutting down Flash's tree. What can be done to save the poor rabbit's home?

programme.title: New Juice
programme.desc: Conrod is visiting Silver Hatch to try out some new bio fuel. But Big Chris fears something is wrong with it after he comes out in spots after sampling a smoothie made from the same produce. What or who could be at fault?

programme.title: Fb For Football
programme.desc: The cars are having a football tournament down at the beach. FB learns that if he relaxes, his natural footballing skills will shine through.

programme.title: The Case Of Bumpy's Burst Ball
programme.desc: It's a play date afternoon in Toy Green and everyone is there having fun. Noddy has got a new ball for Bumpy to replace his old one that went missing. But when he finds the new ball burst in his secret cupboard he decides to investigate…. without letting Bumpy know what's happened. With Big Ears helping out by keeping Bumpy busy, Noddy and Revs are investigating against the clock to find out who burst the ball.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Wings
programme.desc: The fairies are giving a big fairy flying display in Toyland. Fairy Coco is devastated when her wings disappear just before the Flying Display. Queen Sparklewings tells Noddy that the wings will only work for Fairy Coco and if anybody else tries to use them it would be dangerous as they may fall and hurt themselves. Noddy immediately stars to investigate. Following all the clues, he works out that Smartysaurus found the wings after Fairy Coco took them off in the Fairy Garden.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unfunny Clown
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are having a "clown day" and everyone is going to play at being clowns. Noddy shows Fuse his smelling flower joke but Fuse realises he isn't programmed to understand clowning. The clowning goes too far when someone sets up a bucket of balls joke that almost causes an accident. Noddy needs to investigate to find out who is the unfunny clown before a ‘joke' goes too far.

programme.title: Noddy And The Case Of The Raining Carrots
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is having a Farm Fair at the Animal Acres Farm but it looks set to be ruined by an unexpected shower of carrots, cabbages and then pumpkins. Noddy and Deltoid investigate and discover the raining vegetables are caused by Smartysaurus, who is trying to find something heavy enough to go on the other end of her see-saw. She didn't realise that every time she sat on one end of the see-saw, she was sending the vegetables on the other end flying up into the air.

programme.title: Mission to CATurn
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Cupcake Tree
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Belly Flop
programme.desc: The Riders have to save Elbone when he's swallowed by a giant Sea Gronckle, and Dak's awful cooking might be just the thing to do it.

programme.title: Game of Horns
programme.desc: At a big town festival, Magnus challenges Duggard in a competition to be chief of Huttsgalor! Can the Riders help their friend keep his helmet?

programme.title: Photo Day Disaster / The Eightful Eight
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: The Glitter Guide / Piano Panic
programme.desc: When the Dews find out their glitter guide (an older Dew Drop) is coming to visit, they bend over backwards to make a great first impression, but end up forgetting some of their responsiblities in the process. / When a string breaks on Marcus’ piano before his recital and he can’t practice, the Dews must lead Marcus to a new piano.

programme.title: The Case Of Bumpy's Burst Ball
programme.desc: It's a play date afternoon in Toy Green and everyone is there having fun. Noddy has got a new ball for Bumpy to replace his old one that went missing. But when he finds the new ball burst in his secret cupboard he decides to investigate…. without letting Bumpy know what's happened. With Big Ears helping out by keeping Bumpy busy, Noddy and Revs are investigating against the clock to find out who burst the ball.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Wings
programme.desc: The fairies are giving a big fairy flying display in Toyland. Fairy Coco is devastated when her wings disappear just before the Flying Display. Queen Sparklewings tells Noddy that the wings will only work for Fairy Coco and if anybody else tries to use them it would be dangerous as they may fall and hurt themselves. Noddy immediately stars to investigate. Following all the clues, he works out that Smartysaurus found the wings after Fairy Coco took them off in the Fairy Garden.

programme.title: The Case Of The Unfunny Clown
programme.desc: Noddy and his friends are having a "clown day" and everyone is going to play at being clowns. Noddy shows Fuse his smelling flower joke but Fuse realises he isn't programmed to understand clowning. The clowning goes too far when someone sets up a bucket of balls joke that almost causes an accident. Noddy needs to investigate to find out who is the unfunny clown before a ‘joke' goes too far.

programme.title: Noddy And The Case Of The Raining Carrots
programme.desc: Farmer Tom is having a Farm Fair at the Animal Acres Farm but it looks set to be ruined by an unexpected shower of carrots, cabbages and then pumpkins. Noddy and Deltoid investigate and discover the raining vegetables are caused by Smartysaurus, who is trying to find something heavy enough to go on the other end of her see-saw. She didn't realise that every time she sat on one end of the see-saw, she was sending the vegetables on the other end flying up into the air.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Dastardlys Deed of the Devious Diddlysaurus
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Blitzkrieg of the Bothersome Butt-erflies
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Problematic Pandemonium of the Punishing Plungerina
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Angry Abnormal Atrocities of the Astute Animal Agressors
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Confounding Concoction of the Crooked Combotato
programme.desc: A fierce game of plot potato takes an unexpected twist when Melvin unleashes one of his most fiendish -- and carb-loaded -- creations yet.

programme.title: Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Volcano
programme.desc: Ty and Revvit bravely stay behind to build and save their crater from a nearby volcano eruption, but D-Structsdoesn't want them to succeed

programme.title: Lucky and the Wayward Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Kate are getting married... or are they?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Costly Conundrum of the Calamitous Claylossus
programme.desc: George and Harold transform the school's mysterious student into a giant clay monster who turns the entire town into clay

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Jarring Jerkiness of the Judge J.O.R.T.S
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: The Last Guardian
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: A Thread In The Dark
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Slow Boat to England
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Easter Kitty Bunny
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dollhouse Detectives
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Yellow 100
programme.desc: Finally promoted to CEO, Boss Baby sets his sights on achieving 100% Baby Love, while dealing with the annoying Puppies and Preeks who rented Baby Corp office space while Boss was gone. Tim and Danny become local heroes after saving a baby's life.

programme.title: Pyg & Tam
programme.desc: Boss Baby encounters a new threat to Baby Love: an adorable Baby TV show starring Pyg the Pygmy Goat, Tam the Tamandua, and their host Maria-Maria. Boss is told not to go to Corporate War by Board Baby Emiliano, so Boss tries to provoke his enemies to make the first move.

programme.title: Conference Room B
programme.desc: Boss promises Tim he'll help make their parents' anniversary present, but after Puppy Co. and Baby Corp's fight over a conference room escalates, he sends Hendershot is his stead. Hendershot, armed with a file on all of Tim's wants and needs, tries to keep Tim happy.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Ludicrous Lunacy of the Loopy Laserlightmare
programme.desc: Despite being terrible at the job, Krupp wants to be the camp director again next summer. That's something Harold and George simply cannot abide.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Shocking Showdown of the Staggering Sugamechangere
programme.desc: It's parents' weekend at Lake Summer Camp, and Krupp's eager to make amends with Harold and George ... or so he says.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Polarizing Plight of the Pitiless Poopetrators
programme.desc: George and Harold want Cash Networth to buy the camp and fire Krupp. But before he'll agree to pony up the dough, Cash has a small request of his own.

programme.title: Bem-Vindo ao Rio
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Combustion
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Driving Blind
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Blade of the Red Phoenix
programme.desc: Po and the kids are recruited to perform in Mei Mei's theatrical show, but things take a turn when Jindiao ruins the play in order to find a mystical scroll

programme.title: Flying the Coop
programme.desc: A menacing school board Administrator demands Aja and Krel's immigration papers to register for school - a task that turns dangerous for the two "illegal Aliens." Meanwhile, Aja bejins her warrior training with Vex

programme.title: Party Crashers
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 头条开讲
programme.desc: 《头条开讲》是由主播周玉琴及政治中心主任林嘉源共同主持的政论性节目。今日大事看《头条开讲》就知道！台湾不能只有一种声音，也不能只有一种颜色。《头条开讲》最敢讲，你的心声我来讲！

programme.title: cti talk网路论坛
programme.desc: 中天2024全新网路论坛《两岸永久和平 大师对话系列》，我们邀请最顶尖大师，探讨两岸永久和平的可能性，更剖析年轻人心中的集体焦虑。2024总统大选前所有人都该关心的题目，新政府，候选人，年轻世代，三方脑力激荡，欢迎一起来讨论，在未来恐更多变的两岸关系里，碰撞出一个更好的新未来。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十集 我得知道，我在一个什么样的地狱里 罗曼被派去急诊室要一份拍摄许可，抬头见到周慕孙。他打羽毛球扭到腰。两人四目，周慕孙还想叙旧，罗曼拉着路过方驰救场。方驰熟练询问病情，在周慕孙的腰上触诊便开了药。周慕孙行动不便，罗曼本着善意帮他交费拿药，还送他上车，无视方驰。直到方驰赌气不跟罗曼吃夜宵。罗曼觉着他和方驰的关系变化了，在KTV拍摄，节目组安排方驰和刘怡然抄CP，罗曼越看越不是滋味。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十一集 选北京的一套房，还是一个人 家里老人寄错地址，一双给新生儿的虎头鞋，让陈凯西第一次情绪失控，说出离婚。陈勉把责任推到前助理身上，保证处理好一切。接着不惜血本，陈凯西老家拆迁，亲戚跟陈父争房，陈勉就给送了一套，赢得岳父岳母称赞。稳住后方，陈勉心情大好约了羽毛球局，却发现方驰对周慕孙有敌意，周慕孙点出小孩跟罗曼动了情。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 黑灵官
programme.desc: 人称「黑灵官」的宫天龙，押解杀人犯关云飞时遇上大风雪，被迫在宫天龙家留宿。当晚关云飞获同伙所救，逃脱前更砍杀宫天龙之母及幼妹。其后，宫天龙因押解囚犯不利，被打入大牢。宫天龙出狱后，誓要杀死关云飞为家人报仇。

programme.title: 少林子弟
programme.desc: 明末明将吴三桂卖国降清引狼入室，大明江山亦为满清所并，举国有气节之士无不感悲愤。少林子弟纷纷下山，串联各地好汉抗清复明；清官招降纳叛，广收武当、峨嵋派的江湖败类，勾结地方恶霸，向少林子弟赶尽杀绝，洪、方、胡等处在重重危机险恶之中...

programme.title: 徐老虎与白寡妇
programme.desc: 本片改编自高阳同名著作，获第18届金马奖最佳服装设计、最佳美术设计两项奖。本片讲述清朝食盐私枭徐老虎与白寡妇因清官李振彪拒不受贿，再加上责令严缉私盐，二人面临缉案危机。为免同僚落网，白独担罪责。徐悉白被处死，一心复仇...

programme.title: 夕阳恋人
programme.desc: 这是日本导演上梅次文艺片的经典。故事描述井莉饰的车衣女工与秦沛饰的修车工，在夕阳萌生感情，后女因识破男的太子爷身份，深感受骗...

programme.title: 倾国倾城
programme.desc: 李翰祥史诗式电影，艺术成就及导演功力震惊中港台三地。本片荣获金马优等剧情片、最佳女主角及最佳彩色影片美术设计奖项。影后卢燕饰慈禧太后；处女演出即成名的萧瑶，饰死后受追封为贵妃的珍妃；而为珍妃逝世而不近女色的光绪帝则是狄龙。

programme.title: 小英雄
programme.desc: 主角小杂种由隐士抚养并授以武术；一天，隐士嘱他下山访寻父母。途中，他体验到人情冷暖，先与女乞丐小乙惺惺相惜，建立「同是天涯沦落人」的友 谊，亦与邑绅之子顾英豪结怨。最后，他终于从妓院鸨母口中得知自己的身世，原来其生母本在顾家为婢，被老爷引诱成奸后，又遭虐待致死...

programme.title: 相思河畔
programme.desc: 富商之子冯琪伟恋上歌女方碧玉，碧玉身世凄凉，常受流氓头子林老二及李老三压榨勒索，幸得琪伟相助并娶之为妻。婚后二人育一子，惜李老三再度敲诈，最终琪伟为爱妻讨回公道而与李老三同归于尽...

programme.title: 女侠黑蝴蝶
programme.desc: 平时表现得不谙武术的酒铺女子关宝珠，原来是武功了得且专门锄强扶弱的黑蝴蝶。一次黑蝴蝶用从五魔山寨撂夺得来的金子济贫，令她被黑白二道追捕。

programme.title: 艳阳天
programme.desc: 钢琴师李燕南与乐队指挥女儿陈小芸相爱，常指点她歌唱技巧。小芸在一次代替演出中一鸣惊人，得团主及花花公子杜邦杰力捧。小芸赴星马演出，心却惦念燕南，一夜与杜邦杰于车内发生争执，怎料汽车失事...

programme.title: 壁虎
programme.desc: 为要对付一名贪污的总警司，屡犯窃案的大贼「壁虎」，预告将在富翁的宴会中盗取钻石。后来被总警司的孙女揭穿他真正的身份，原来是个正义凛然的年青员警。

programme.title: 野姑娘
programme.desc: 金小芳是一位活泼且无畏的乡村少女，面对恶霸从不退缩，总是勇敢反抗。当她揭露了唐家大少爷的阴谋后，立刻引来他的狠毒报复。幸好，她心仪的男子大海及时挺身而出相救。两人能否携手对抗险恶命运，改写结局？

programme.title: 流星蝴蝶剑
programme.desc: 这部武侠传奇故事，集合瑰丽的画面、诡秘悬疑、权力斗争及动作于一身，成功地将精彩的动作场面与紧凑的剧情结合。藉江湖两大帮会内部叛变，从而刻划出人性叵测及真善混淆的一面。

programme.title: 老夫子奇趣录
programme.desc: 电影承上集继续笑料百出。这次，大蕃薯开了一家中医诊所，但传统的中医似乎不为时髦的香港社会接受。最后得靠好友老夫子相助，为他解决疑难！

programme.title: Unintended Consequences
programme.desc: Maggie relives her shattering trip to Africa; an OWS protester is humiliated in an on-air interview with Will.

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: High school students, Alex and friends, avoided death when he has a premonition but the survivors discover that death isn’t through with them yet.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes The Field
programme.desc: In this HBO Comedy Special, Will Ferrell takes the field and plays every position for ten different baseball teams over ten days.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale
programme.desc: It's time to say goodbye… When Mary finds herself at the center of a public scandal and the family faces financial trouble.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: An unlikely love triangle teaches three individuals the value of love and life.

programme.title: Einstein And Eddington
programme.desc: A story about the unlikely partnership during World War I between a young British scientist named Arthur Eddington and the brilliant physicist, Albert Einstein.

programme.title: Kill Chain: The Cyber War On America's Elections
programme.desc: A chilling look at how vulnerable the technology used in the US voting systems really is.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

programme.title: Game Change
programme.desc: Adapted from the non-fiction book of the same name, this HBO Original Movie provides an insider's look at the 2008 US presidential election.

programme.title: Bury My Heart At Wounded Knee
programme.desc: An HBO Original film which explores the impact after the US government wages a campaign to exterminate American Indians.

programme.title: North Country
programme.desc: A single mother retaliates against her male co-workers in an iron mine, leading to the first class-action lawsuit for sexual discrimination in America.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events.

programme.title: Pie Society
programme.desc: Eight home bakers must make pies with a decorative crust; the bakers flex their flavour muscles in the elimination challenge by creating a dessert that showcases one of the major taste sensations.

programme.title: Best Fruit Forward
programme.desc: The home bakers bejewel a chocolate sculpture; the bakers create an appealing entremets that replicates a piece of fruit.

programme.title: World of Flavor
programme.desc: With the immunity off the table, the top six bakers pair up to build a magnificent meringue tower; after receiving a postcard from home, the bakers embark on a sweet journey and deliver a dessert showcasing an international ingredient.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Chocolate!
programme.desc: The remaining five bakers must rise to the occasion as they bake chocolate bread and use it to make a dessert deli sandwich; in the elimination challenges, the bakers must create a dessert inspired by an iconic film genre.

programme.title: Sweet Suspensions
programme.desc: The final four use their chocolate and confectionary skills to create a delectable trifle terrarium; with one elimination challenge before the finale, the bakers must create a three-tiered suspended cake.

programme.title: A Tale of Three Bakers
programme.desc: The home bakers are tasked with telling their baking story through four delectable dessert chapters; one baker walks away with the $50,000 grand prize and the title of Great Chocolate Showdown Champion.

programme.title: Let The Games Begin!
programme.desc: Ten home bakers enter the kitchen and are tasked with creating a chocolate Tic Tac Toe board. In the Elimination Challenge, the bakers set a scrumptious scene by delivering a cake diorama.

programme.title: Think Outside the Bar
programme.desc: The remaining nine bakers must think beyond the bar as they create a nougat-filled chocolate confection in a surprising shape; the bakers aim to please in the elimination challenge with a dessert that pairs chocolate with cheese.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Pancreatic disease develops deep inside the body and makes early detection difficult - we report on efforts to find it sooner using endoscopic ultrasound and the doctors working on new treatments.

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: Are you always tired and struggle to sleep? You may be suffering from under-nutrition. The condition even affects people who believe they eat balanced meals. We look at the causes and fixes.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: For the sake of their families, Nepalese men are working for the Russian military. Wages 10 times higher than in Nepal are promised, but as many go missing, their families await word on their fate.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Do you know what to do when disaster strikes? If you don't, Andrew Mitchell from the UK has some stories to tell you from his own experience living through the 2016 Kumamoto quakes.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter - this time, super-absorbent towels.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: After a slow start, Japanese washing machines have become some of the most advanced in the world - we look at their development and the latest innovations.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: At dusk in summer, a woman is absorbed in reading a letter; this chic lady is actually an advertisement model for Mitsui Echigoya, one of the top kimono fabric stores in Edo.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: Tokyo Skytree, one of Japan's most famous tourist attractions, is equipped with a variety of countermeasures against disasters - we go behind the scenes to explore the tower's advanced technologies.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: Explore the different types of romantic hero who appear in kabuki. From sweet, comic charmers to brooding bad boys, actor Kataoka Ainosuke explains these heroic archetypes.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) QF 1 & 2
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. programme.title: The Sugar Shack
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: Recycling agent
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Wheelchair
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Question-and-answer reading
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: A good friend
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: But where's Marcel?
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Dream Breakfast
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Super cyclone 2000
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Ring-tailed lemur
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: The defeat
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Pollen: soon everyone allergic?
programme.desc: In the 1960s, 3% of French people were allergic to pollen, compared to 30% today. How to explain it? CO2 emissions, fine particles, pollen season, ragweed... Hugo Clement investigates. Fortunately, people across the country are fighting against allergenic plants.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

The husband and wife police team soon realise that the murder is linked to the legend of the mysterious pregnant Virgin.

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 巴朗抓内鬼庭威传信 谢庭威打出电话，是雄记茶餐厅，证明了庭威的清白，何浩辉决定第二天无论如何都要收网。手机被没收的谢庭威为了尽快将消息传递出去，主动要求试试希罗达，在仪式后发起了高烧。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 警匪激战周雄再逃脱 民生货柜场内，伊亚和八皮开始交易。何浩辉突然叫停行动，只让密切跟踪这两拨人。原来谢庭威通过设计好的暗号，将交易有诈的信息传递给何浩辉。周雄告诉八皮，演出开始了。伊亚将车开进合力货柜场，一众警员跟踪车辆驶往合力货柜场。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 金融核弹重启全港危 周雄和安娜密谋时，通过琼斯的照片发现了金融核弹的代码可能藏在佛牌里。周雄回忆起，在兰崖军团时，希瓦曾经告诉他，这个佛牌替琼斯挡了刀。然后，周雄还想起在合力货柜场接货时，希瓦在临死前把佛牌给了那个南亚裔警察。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十集 我得知道，我在一个什么样的地狱里 罗曼被派去急诊室要一份拍摄许可，抬头见到周慕孙。他打羽毛球扭到腰。两人四目，周慕孙还想叙旧，罗曼拉着路过方驰救场。方驰熟练询问病情，在周慕孙的腰上触诊便开了药。周慕孙行动不便，罗曼本着善意帮他交费拿药，还送他上车，无视方驰。直到方驰赌气不跟罗曼吃夜宵。罗曼觉着他和方驰的关系变化了，在KTV拍摄，节目组安排方驰和刘怡然抄CP，罗曼越看越不是滋味。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十一集 选北京的一套房，还是一个人 家里老人寄错地址，一双给新生儿的虎头鞋，让陈凯西第一次情绪失控，说出离婚。陈勉把责任推到前助理身上，保证处理好一切。接着不惜血本，陈凯西老家拆迁，亲戚跟陈父争房，陈勉就给送了一套，赢得岳父岳母称赞。稳住后方，陈勉心情大好约了羽毛球局，却发现方驰对周慕孙有敌意，周慕孙点出小孩跟罗曼动了情。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: RBC Heritage Round 2
programme.desc: The Heritage is South Carolina's only signature event on the PGA TOUR. It was first played 56 years ago in 1969. The venue for its entire existence has been the Harbour Town Golf Links at the Sea Pines Resort on Hilton Head Island. The original purse of USD$100,000 (USD$770,000 in today’s dollars) has jumped to USD$20 million.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) SF 1
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: FANZONE - FRI 17 APR
programme.desc: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. We connect with fans from around the world as they share their views on their teams and favourite players.

programme.title: PREVIEW - FRI 17 APR
programme.desc: We preview Manchester City's blockbuster title clash with Arsenal, Liverpool's trip to Everton for the Merseyside derby, and Chelsea hosting Manchester United.

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND - FRI 17 APR
programme.desc: Ayo's on the road in Manchester as the Premier League's top two meet in an encounter that could have huge ramifications in the title race. Ellie Collins catches up with Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes as he attempts to break the Premier League assist record.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he's overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: TEAM TALKS - FRI 17 APR

programme.desc: Haaland or Salah? Saka or Palmer? Isak or Cunha? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy, but the Fantasy Show is on hand to help FPL Managers with those big decisions.

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 综艺玩很大
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与超人气主持KID林柏昇联手合作，艺人分成两队挑战各式关卡，节目充满趣味性，更借外景地点的不同，带领观众深入了解各地风土民情。

programme.title: 卫斯理蓝血人
programme.desc: 联合国外星生物分析局成员卫斯理在调查神秘蓝色人骨时，重遇拥有蓝色血液的外星女子方天涯，并卷入外星势力的追捕与冲突之中。在生死交锋与逃亡过程中，两人逐渐建立深厚情感，同时揭开一场关乎外星秘密与命运的惊人真相。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.desc: 《第44届香港电影金像奖》万众瞩目，影坛年度盛事！巨星云集，星光熠熠，表彰台前幕后卓越贡献，共同见证至高荣耀花落谁家！

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 第44届香港电影金像奖颁奖典礼
programme.desc: 《第44届香港电影金像奖》万众瞩目，影坛年度盛事！巨星云集，星光熠熠，表彰台前幕后卓越贡献，共同见证至高荣耀花落谁家！

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.desc: All the action from the 2025/26 Gallagher Premiership, England's top level of rugby union.

programme.title: 蛊
programme.desc: 故事描述黄锦燊饰的督察查出女童被杀案的凶手，竟为其父艾飞；艾狱中求见黄，告知曾在某地邂逅一女子，获赠颈饰，自此，林突感有性无能之趋向，而其女忽嗜生肉，并数次有伤害林之意图，友人劝其赴巫婆处占算，巫婆算出其女系邪魔入体，必须以九寸钉钉在头上将其钉死，林即在此不可思议力量作崇之下，将亲女钉死；黄赴某地查探线索，并从神媒查出艾中了尸油降，唯神媒法力不足，不能查出谁为降头师，嘱黄往一百里外之古刹，览高僧温马达摩求助...

programme.title: 最佳女婿
programme.desc: 新潮发型屋少东 Happy 哥与死党赖布甸、龙眼仔, 因抢走上海理发店板大松客人, 与他发生口角. 一夜, 三人胡涂地与松女儿阿英醉宿一宵, 之后英意外怀孕, 不知是谁才是经手人, 惟有待孩子出世后, 以血型辨别亲父, 怎料三人皆属同一血型...

programme.title: 夜守
programme.desc: 在一次车祸后失忆的王人杰找到夜间警卫的工作。午夜，他准时抵达废弃的大厦上班，却发现三只冤魂如约而至，并揭发了一场复仇计画。究竟这是命运的安排还是邪灵的诅咒？

programme.title: 裂战
programme.desc: 为了对抗温室效应，女科学家颜欣培育出超级橡胶种子，前往一个荒岛进行种植，希望将那里改变为一片欣欣向荣的新土地。然而，她的前夫决定在这趟危险的旅程中保护她，与她结伴同行。抵达后，他们面临接连不断的冲突，并遇上当地的贩毒组织，一场生死对决随即展开。

programme.title: 冥婚
programme.desc: 摄影师陈志成长年被一名「红衣女子」纠缠，导致多位亲人惨死；甚至连自己心仪的女孩思桐亦难逃恶运。志成欲寻找思桐惨死的真相，却揭发关于一场「冥婚」的秘密...

programme.title: 女特警之暗战
programme.desc: 东州地区长期盘踞一支贩毒集团。霹雳女子突击队队员梅静率领其他队员成功攻入贩毒集团的制毒基地，却中了预先设下的埋伏，梅爸爸是犯罪集团内部的卧底身份亦随之暴露。最后，梅静与突击队员们经历一轮激战后，击败对手，并救出梅爸爸。

programme.title: 我爱神仙遮
programme.desc: 推土车司机阿成，在工作时忽遇地陷而堕入一地下古庙，无意中成为油纸伞妖的主人。她更将自己现身的秘密及超凡的法力告知阿成。地盘工目凡叔嗜赌，欠下恶少高利贷，恶少垂涎凡叔之女美色，要凡叔以女还债；阿成得悉后请伞妖戏弄恶少，并暗助凡叔在赌场获胜，清还债项。惟此神伞之秘密却被恶少发现...

programme.title: 曼谷风云
programme.desc: 地下拳手林枫因拒绝替曼谷黑帮打黑拳，因此被追杀。他虽成功逃脱，却失去记忆。当林枫开展其新生活时，却被黑帮发现行踪，并找来绝顶打手对付他。期间林枫忽然回复记忆，并誓要将黑帮歼灭。

programme.title: 我的野蛮同学
programme.desc: 在一间Band5学校有个打擂台的传统，学生会在课室将很多张书桌拼成一个擂台，在擂台上进行决胜去解决一切争执。四个性格各异的少年石头、Edward、亚凤、Seven意外地成为朋友，共同经历了难忘的成长体验...

programme.title: 龙的传人
programme.desc: 青年周小龙离开纯朴的离岛到香港发展。他的师叔欺骗小龙参加桌球比赛，并以他父亲的地皮作为赌注。小龙最后输掉了比赛，幸得他青梅竹马的朋友毛毛鼓励，把自家的田地也作为赌注。小龙最后能否把自己的土地赢回来？

programme.title: 军火大劫案
programme.desc: 特工阿文被安排潜伏于东南亚的军火商旗下，寻找其手中的一批军火炸药并将其销毁。当他终于找到该批军火后，却遭到不明匪徒袭击。为防止灾难发生，阿文决定与他的特工搭档阿琼合力夺回军火。

programme.title: 审死官
programme.desc: 周星驰饰演著名状师宋世杰，经常不择手段为富人打赢官司，让他们逍遥法外，因此妻子迫使他退隐乡间。然而，当宋夫人结识一位丈夫之死被贪官掩盖的妇人时，宋世杰决定挺身而出，再次在公堂上伸张正义，为她讨回公道。

programme.title: 青蛙王子
programme.desc: 此喜剧在夏威夷开始，富家子为人腼腆，追女乏术，好友充当其爱情顾问，带他四出泡妞，却碰得一鼻子灰，闹出连场笑话。

programme.title: 武状元苏乞儿
programme.desc: 苏乞儿原为贵族，但因上京考武状元时作弊，被眨为乞儿。苏乞儿在机缘巧合下救了丐帮长老，并接任为新帮主。一天，皇上狩猎之时，差点被暗杀，幸苏乞儿及时救驾。皇帝欲恢复其官职时，苏乞儿却拒绝。其后，皇上御赐一个乞儿钵予苏乞儿，从此他过着愉快的行乞生活。

programme.title: 凌晨两点半2
programme.desc: 依成和朋友到聚魂灵山探险，传说山中埋着千年女尸，千年不灭之阴火，进去的人都逃不出来。凌晨两点半，依成的朋友先后突然消失。在森林搜索期间，依成进入无限轮回的灵异空间，更恐怖的事情却接踵而来...

programme.title: 霹雳先锋
programme.desc: 张铁柱是一名出色的警长，他刚烈的办案风格却遭到上司和同僚的不满。当他意外发现偷车贼伟仔为追捕持枪劫匪的关键人物，两人不得不携手将罪犯绳之以法。

programme.title: 替枪老豆
programme.desc: 万与夏婚后多年忽想生育，但万被证实不育，让夏接受人工受孕；但万心中仍感怪异，内心矛盾弄得精神紧张，行为乖张，闹出不少笑话；万在夏平安产子前后，屡有奇异幻想，误会连场，猜疑甚多，更怀疑夏与任职于夏威夷精子银行的表哥潘震伟有染，不是人工受孕，而是被人受孕。

programme.title: 烈探
programme.desc: 警探张荼为救落入人贩之手的儿子，不惜孤身深入敌穴，跨国追击，但却被牵扯进大型儿童拐卖案。在寻找儿子的过程中，他和身份神秘的女子携手捣毁了一个大型国际犯罪集团，上演了一场惊心动魄的绝地生死营救。

programme.title: 白蛇传说
programme.desc: 这部奇幻动作片改编自中国经典传说《白蛇传》，讲述郎中许仙爱上化身为女子的千年白蛇。白蛇的真实身份被揭露后，高僧法海为守护人类与超自然力量之间的平衡，不得不挺身而出，展开一场惊心动魄的对决。

programme.title: 九龙城寨
programme.desc: 曾是东北街头武霸的阿能为了出人头地，洗心革面来到香港的九龙城寨从零开始打拼，不料却卷入一场黑恶势力间的阴谋和混战。最终为保护被黑恶势力追杀的好朋友，阿能重拾自我，挺身而出，与城寨居民一同对抗黑恶势力，誓死保卫朋友。

programme.title: 封口者
programme.desc: 罗雪与男友吵架后，出走来到深山民宿与伊伊成为合租室友。一晚，罗雪无意中撞破依依及其友人雷松杀死依依的前男友。为免走漏消息，他们囚禁罗雪于阁楼中。罗雪的知己苏文发现她失踪后，到处找寻她的下落。最后，罗雪及苏文能否成功逃出险境?

programme.title: 三十处男
programme.desc: 设计师赵宇庭被批算三十岁前结婚，会被妻子克死，赵父遂严禁赵宇庭结交异性。但限期将届，他急不及待觅对象。荔玲与母亲同为死人化妆师，为了交男友改为新娘化妆，此时她认识了赵宇庭...

programme.title: 僵尸叔叔
programme.desc: 偏僻山间，一僧一道比邻而居。和尚（午马 饰）随和开朗，更有一女徒菁菁（李丽珍 饰）玲珑可爱；道士（陈友 饰）古板严厉，而徒弟嘉乐（钱嘉乐 饰）却鬼马顽皮。性格不同的两个师傅口角不断，大斗其法，两个冤家徒弟也搞笑连连，笑料频出。

programme.title: 赤脚小子
programme.desc: 穷乡青年关丰曜，终日赤着双脚，以背人过河为活。关父临终前，嘱其出城投靠段青云；段骤见故人之子，留下关在布店当小工。关与私塾女教师华小莲交心，却遭莲父白眼；关为求出人头地，竟往投靠土霸喀和布，结果连累莲父与段相继被喀暗算身亡。关得知真相，惜为时已晚，追悔莫及，决与喀拼过死活...

programme.title: 逃学威龙 2
programme.desc: 周星星遭降职后愤而辞去警职，私自潜入一所国际学校，调查国际恐怖分子的阴谋。期间，他意外发现探员达叔正假扮成教师。两人随即联手，共同对抗全副武装的罪犯，展开一场终极对决。

programme.title: 千王斗千霸
programme.desc: 一位名震千坛的千王之王及其伙伴被政府雇用，以调查一名赌术了得的上海大亨。当局怀疑他藉开赌场掩饰其在上海情报机关的日本千霸身份。

programme.title: 师兄撞鬼
programme.desc: 该片描述董骠调查制造毒品案，却惨死在毒贩枪下。董骠化做鬼魂回警察局，借警员周星驰之手查清杀己的凶手。冯淬帆和周星驰在茅山老祖的指导下利用灵药合力斗败邪恶法师，枪毙邓公子，为董骠报了仇，使他能安心上天堂。

programme.title: 精武风云 - 陈真
programme.desc: 1920年代的上海，陈真以年轻实业家身份潜伏，欲揭露黑社会头目与日军的勾结。他不仅要取得头目的信任，还需应对日军将领麾下杀手的重重狙杀。为隐匿行迹，他戴起黑色面具，联手警局队长，以威猛铁拳守护这座城市的爱国志士。

programme.title: 风雨同路
programme.desc: 卧底探员张郎奉命接近前黑帮大哥李云飞，调查冷血匪帮首领大傻所涉及的钻石劫案，并借机套取线报。当交易出现意外后，钻石落入李云飞手中，大傻决心将两人置于死地。张郎与李云飞被迫联手反击。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 我们家的料理
programme.desc: 失恋的亮亮为了证明经济能力将房间出租给热爱烹饪的阿治，两人在层出不穷的暖心料理中互相慰藉。这对性格截然不同的男孩一拍即合，在美食与陪伴中填补了彼此的空虚，建立起一段奇妙有趣的伙伴关系。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 美女厨房
programme.desc: 萧正楠、Bob和张振朗主持第三度开放的《美女厨房》。一众女艺人听完菜名及流程简介，便要动手煮出指定菜式，在烹调时更要保持神秘感，让男嘉宾猜猜她们是谁。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 迷网
programme.desc: 高级督察司徒忠隶属网络安全及科技罪案调查科。他与刚毕业的见习督察萧美婷一起联手破获各种网络诈骗案的同时，不知不觉中互生好感。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 大梦想家
programme.desc: 主持谭凯萤游走台湾各地，深入市区黄金地段、新市镇发展潜力区域，探寻气派不凡的豪宅别墅与特色家居，细看《大梦想家》！移居台湾的港人，如何实现置业与创业梦想？多位「梦想家」分享当地的买楼故事与生活指南。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 还原神之食
programme.desc: 文学作品中的虚构菜式，大家可有推想过是甚么味道？主持请来星级厨师，从电视剧集、电玩游戏、卡通动画、文学名著中寻找创意灵感，发掘内里提到的一些特色美食，并透过名厨的巧手，将这些看似不真实的菜式「还原」。

programme.title: 教煮争霸
programme.desc: 当「鼎爷」李家鼎、「三姐」萧秀香刚柔相遇，意味着一场全新的厨房大战蓄势待发！每集由嘉宾为鼎爷与三姐出题，当中包括著名厨师、识食艺人等，务求让两人以相同食材或主题，烹调出各具风格的菜式，比试同时分享煮食心得。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 退休有乜计
programme.desc: 《退休有乜计》探讨香港人如何为安稳、有意义的退休生活做好准备。节目通过真实个案、专家访谈和理财建议，分析退休究竟需要多少积蓄，强积金及其他储蓄工具的角色，并讨论六十岁后兼职工作究竟是无奈之举还是个人选择。

programme.title: 唱钱
programme.desc: 挑战音域的极限、拍子的精准，全新互动音乐游戏节目《唱钱》由森美、Eric Kwok、李茵彤任主持，以专业音准分析系统考验参赛者。九宫格代表九个难度等级，参赛者每当连成一线「过三关」，可选择提款离场、继续挑战，甚至是最难的Monster关卡。

programme.title: J Music
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: Jabalpur, India
programme.desc: After more than a fortnight of travel, Benafsha and Krisann stop at Bhedaghat for some exciting adventures amid its stunning marble cliffs.

programme.title: Bruges 1
programme.desc: From a visit to a chocolate shop to a canal ride along picturesque waterways, Elisha’s experiences in Bruges leave her transfixed with its romance.

programme.title: Barcelona
programme.desc: From Antoni Gaudi’s whims to hosting the 1992 Olympics, Alex finds out that Barcelona has been shaped by many different things.

programme.title: Innsbruck, Austria
programme.desc: On the last leg of his action-packed gastronomic escapade across Austria, Chef Jolly arrives at the captivating city of Innsbruck.

programme.title: Polonnaruwa
programme.desc: The host learns about the traditions, beliefs and history of Sri Lanka in the ancient cities of Kandy, Polonnaruwa and Sigiriya.

programme.title: Leh, India
programme.desc: From the divine Thikse monastery to the serene Pangong Lake, Alex Outhwaite soaks in the Zen at Leh.

programme.title: Bandhavgarh, India
programme.desc: Will Krisann and Benafsha’s safari in Bandhavgarh National Park offer them a chance to see the big striped cat in all its glory?

programme.title: Bruges 2
programme.desc: From sipping beer in a 500-year-old bar to visiting one of Bruges’s oldest breweries, Elisha explores the craze that Belgians have for beer.

programme.title: Madrid
programme.desc: From visiting the Baroque style Royal Palace to relishing churros at Chocolateria San Gines, Alex enjoys the city’s liveliness wherever she goes.

programme.title: Colombo
programme.desc: The host visits the iconic sights of Colombo, and goes on to take a river safari and visit a turtle hatchery in Bentota.

programme.title: Dubrovnik, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite finds out the three best ways to enjoy medieval seaside town of Dubrovnik, the pearl of the Adriatic.

programme.title: Nubra valley, ladakh
programme.desc: At Nubra Valley, Alex participates in the local dance, and then sets off for a ride on a Bactrian camel across the Hunder sand dunes.

programme.title: Orchha, India
programme.desc: Benafsha and Krisann’s journey takes them back in time in the medieval town of Orchha, the erstwhile capital of the Bundelkhand empire.

programme.title: Antwerp 1
programme.desc: Known as Belgium’s capital of cool, Antwerp has long been a powerful magnet for different kinds of people from diamond dealers to fashion moguls.

programme.title: Valencia
programme.desc: Alex visits Valencia, Spain’s third largest city, and discovers that it has the bones of a metropolis and the heart of a quaint seaside town.

programme.title: Galle
programme.desc: The host loses herself in the colonial hangover of Galle. She also finds out about unique traditions such as mask making and stilt fishing.

programme.title: Barc & Split, Croatia
programme.desc: After trying out a few adventurous activities in Brac?, Alex Outhwaite explores Diocletian’s Palace in Split.

programme.title: Kargil, India
programme.desc: From a Sikh Gurudwara to an organization devoted to the betterment of Ladakhi people, Alex finds herself inspired by the humanity in Kargil.

programme.title: Gwalior, India
programme.desc: Krisann and Benafsha visit the palace of the Scindias who once ruled Gwalior. And they realize that the royal-residence-turned-museum is an ode to opulence.

programme.title: Antwerp 2
programme.desc: Being the latest European hipster hub, with an avant garde cultural scene, doesn’t stop Antwerp from boasting of its rich and interesting history.

programme.title: Maya Ubud, Bali
programme.desc: At Maya Ubud Spa Resort, Jamie Srubis tries different spa treatments that induce the same tranquility which Bali does.

programme.title: Mirissa
programme.desc: The host tries whale watching in Mirissa, goes on a bike tour in Wellawaya and explores tea gardens in Ella..

programme.title: Split & Salona, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite learns about the Roman history of Croatia at Split, the second largest city in Croatia. She also visits the ruins of Salona.

programme.title: Kumbakonam
programme.desc: In Kumbakonam, Emeline experiences the rhythms of rural life and the living traditions of Tamil culture.

programme.title: Indore, India
programme.desc: On the last leg of their journey in Madhya Pradesh, Benafsha and Krisann visit the street food capital of central India, Indore.

programme.title: Ghent
programme.desc: From St. Bavo’s Cathedral to the imposing walled castle of Hof ten Walle, Elisha realizes that every place in Ghent has an interesting story to it.

programme.title: Fusion Maia, Vietnam
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries spa treatments, which are exclusive at the Fusion Maia resort in Da Nang, Vietnam, such as the Natural Living Massage.

programme.title: Polonnaruwa
programme.desc: The host learns about the traditions, beliefs and history of Sri Lanka in the ancient cities of Kandy, Polonnaruwa and Sigiriya.

programme.title: Zadar, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite explores the offbeat attractions of Zadar, a Mediterranean port bursting with personality.

programme.title: Zanskar, India
programme.desc: From stumbling upon a statue of Guru Rinpoche to attending a local festival at a monastery, Alex explores the influence of Buddhism in Zanskar Valley.

programme.title: Illinois
programme.desc: Genevieve’s journey along the legendary Route 66 begins in Chicago, where towering skyscrapers and city streets give way to the open road.

programme.title: Kumbakonam
programme.desc: In Kumbakonam, Emeline experiences the rhythms of rural life and the living traditions of Tamil culture.

programme.title: Shangri La, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries some of the signature spa treatments of the Shangri La Resort at Kota Kinabalu in Sabah, Malaysia.

programme.title: Jumerriah Al Qasar, Dubai
programme.desc: From the fragrances at the Perfume Souk to a hot air balloon ride in the desert, Sabrina gets a taste of heritage and luxury at Madinat Jumeirah.

programme.title: Plitvice Lopar & Zagreb, Croatia
programme.desc: Alex Outhwaite explores the island life in Croatia, when she visits the charming Rab Island.

programme.title: Amatra
programme.desc: Looking for a break from the chaos and stress of city life, Asmita decides to visit Haridwar, a place which she had last visited with her family.

programme.title: Missouri
programme.desc: Crossing from Illinois into Missouri, Genevieve begins to peel back layers of the country’s history and the golden age of Route 66.

programme.title: Santorini Greece
programme.desc: With its sea-drowned caldera, black-sand beaches and crimson sunsets, Santorini is the archetypal Greek island fantasy.

programme.title: Philippines Sun Downers
programme.desc: The Night is alive without a dull moment. Welcome for a dreamy rendezvous with the bewitching night and stay awake as we roll-out to you five sun-down options to spice your sojourn in the Philippines.

programme.title: Penghu Island, Taiwan
programme.desc: Alex visits Taiwan’s Penghu island, popular for its tropical weather and sun kissed beaches, bundled with a host of water adventures.

programme.title: Srinagar, India
programme.desc: From a magical shikara ride on Dal Lake to an elaborate Kashmiri Wazwan, Alex experiences "paradise on Earth" in Srinagar.

programme.title: Amatra
programme.desc: Looking for a break from the chaos and stress of city life, Asmita decides to visit Haridwar, a place which she had last visited with her family.

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 我想和你唱5
programme.desc: 《我想和你唱》第五季震撼回归！本季节目将继续升维星素共唱新玩法，通过搭档形式，让广大民众展现才华，演绎出多元的音乐风格。让我们一同感受大众力量的扩音，沉浸式体验音乐最本真的愉悦，让记忆中的美妙旋律闪耀发光吧!

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 综艺玩很大
programme.desc: 综艺天王吴宗宪与超人气主持KID林柏昇联手合作，艺人分成两队挑战各式关卡，节目充满趣味性，更借外景地点的不同，带领观众深入了解各地风土民情。

programme.title: 卫斯理蓝血人
programme.desc: 联合国外星生物分析局成员卫斯理在调查神秘蓝色人骨时，重遇拥有蓝色血液的外星女子方天涯，并卷入外星势力的追捕与冲突之中。在生死交锋与逃亡过程中，两人逐渐建立深厚情感，同时揭开一场关乎外星秘密与命运的惊人真相。

programme.title: 你好，星期六
programme.desc: 节目通过新奇多样的环节设置和兼具知识性、趣味性的创意内容，深度展现明星艺能。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026
programme.desc: 节目以"慢下来，趣生活"为核心，经营一家有趣、好玩、有温度的年轻客栈。在经营与体验中，解锁未知惊喜，邂逅温暖故事，共赴一场关于陪伴、治愈与热爱的"趣生活"之旅。

programme.title: 灼灼风流
programme.desc: 讲述了心存凌云之志、一心考取功名的女官慕灼华（景甜饰）与沙场沐血折戟、誓为同袍雪冤的战神刘衍（冯绍峰饰）彼此救赎、相知相爱，携手守家卫国的故事。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。
