programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 去湘当有味的地方
programme.desc: 汪涵作为大哥带领沈梦辰、吴泽林网罗全省美食，借此展现14个市州丰富多元的湘菜味道，透过美食背后的故事，展现湖南各地独特的乡情烟火气。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 夜限照相馆
programme.desc: 剧情讲述只为逝者存在的鬼客专门照相馆的刻薄摄影师徐奇周（周元饰）和热血的律师韩春（权娜拉饰）与阴森森的夜客们来往于生死之间惊险又奇妙的故事。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 声生不息·华流季
programme.desc: 以"华流国际化"为核心，《声生不息·华流季》以音乐对抗与融合为引，推动华语音乐走向世界。从金曲回忆到文化共鸣，跨越三代的声音在舞台上汇聚，用旋律唤醒集体记忆，谱写属于华语乐坛的自信新章。

programme.title: 第44届香港电影金像奖星光大道
programme.desc: 《第44届香港电影金像奖》万众瞩目，影坛年度盛事！巨星云集，星光熠熠，表彰台前幕后卓越贡献，共同见证至高荣耀花落谁家！

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 第44届香港电影金像奖颁奖典礼
programme.desc: 《第44届香港电影金像奖》万众瞩目，影坛年度盛事！巨星云集，星光熠熠，表彰台前幕后卓越贡献，共同见证至高荣耀花落谁家！

programme.title: 山海夏味
programme.desc: 《山海夏味》通过市井美食和鲜味文化，探访街头小店的烹饪智慧与地域精神。节目打破精致摆盘套路，用生动镜头展现活鱼、热锅等原始食材冲击力，聚焦坚守在烟火中的普通人，呈现一方水土的饮食江湖与生活哲学。

programme.title: 综艺大热门
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: Rainbow's Lost Colors / Boots' Rubber Band Ball
programme.desc: The twins are excited to see their first rainbow, but it's missing its colors! Dora sets off to return its azul, rojo, y amarillo. // Boots' rubber band ball bounces into the Forest Next Door, and he must ask Cynthia the Centipede to get it back.

programme.title: The Alebrije Adventure / Let's Get A Paleta
programme.desc: Ale the Alebrije asks Dora for her help! The Alebrije tree is wilting, so it's up to Dora to find its rainbow water. // On a super hot day, everyone wants paleta, but Val's paleta truck is stuck! Dora goes to rescue her and get paletas for everyone.

programme.title: Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on "Thesee", a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: The Barbapapa Family / The House of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: The Crew and Chase Are On The Case
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: Pups And The Alien Grandpa / Pups Save a Lemon-Loving Duckling
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot tells the tale of how he learned to speak fluent "alien" while shipwrecked with an Alien Grandpa! // A lemon-loving baby duckling from Yumi's Farm gets mixed up in a delivery to Lizzy's Lemonade Shoppe.

programme.title: Pups Save a Hum-Kicker / Pups Save the One-Man Band
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger turns up the power on his robotic soccer cleats, the 'Hum-Kickers', and starts wrecking the town. // Francois causes musical mayhem, as a one-man band, when he plans a special song for Wally's birthday.

programme.title: Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Popcorn Cafe / The Crew Fixes A Slippery Mess
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Cafe Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasure
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Backpack's Charm / Lost Banana Blankie
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before! // Dora helps Boots find his lost banana blankie before it's bedtime at the sleepover party!

programme.title: Snow Day Showdown
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Axle City, and every truck in town is lining up for a delicious winter warm-up: hot chocolate! But when Crusher tries to take all the hot chocolate for himself, Blaze is in hot pursuit to get it back!

programme.title: Pest Friend
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile try to help Roland find a best friend to take to an acorn show.

programme.title: Stuck On You
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope.

programme.title: Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Firefighters to the Rescue!
programme.desc: When three fire emergencies break out across Axle City, it's up to Blaze to put 'em out - and to do it, he'll transform into the most epic fire rescue vehicles we've ever seen!

programme.title: Big Rig: Dolphin Delivery
programme.desc: When a dolphin named Flippy needs help getting back to his family in the ocean, there's only one monster machine with enough power to get the job done: Big Rig Blaze!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Skyscraper
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: Pups Rescue a Rescuer / Pups Save the Phantom of the Frog Pond
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny, but the pups end up having to rescue the rescuer, too! // A spooky sound forces frogs from their home. The pups must bring them home and solve the mystery of the frog pond phantom

programme.title: Pups Save a Tour Bus / Pups Save Midnight at the Museum
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the mini-patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

programme.title: The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Delphine Donkey
programme.desc: Peppa's French friend Delphine Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to daycare for a visit, where they teach her the 'Bing Bong Song', the class' favorite song to sing.

programme.title: Fire Engine
programme.desc: When Mummy Pig helps out at Miss Rabbit's fire station, she is called upon to douse the flames at Daddy Pig's out-of-control barbecue!

programme.title: Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: Teddy's Playgroup
programme.desc: Peppa brings home a teddy from daycare to look after, but she is worried that he will not have a very exciting time.

programme.title: Compost
programme.desc: Peppa and George take a bin of vegetable peelings to Grandpa Pig's compost heap. Worms inside the bin turn the peelings into compost, which Granny and Grandpa use to help their plants grow.

programme.title: Richard Rabbit Comes to Play
programme.desc: Richard Rabbit comes to play with George, and Suzy Sheep comes to play with Peppa! The boys and girls don't want to play the same games, but they all like jumping up and down in muddy puddles.

programme.title: Fun Run
programme.desc: Daddy Pig finds it hard work when he runs a race to raise money for the school roof, but it's easier to run when a wasp is chasing him!

programme.title: Washing
programme.desc: Daddy Pig hangs his clean football shirt out to dry, but Peppa, George and Mummy splash it with mud. They put it in the wash, but Peppa puts her red dress in too - which turns Daddy's shirt pink!

programme.title: Polly's Boat Trip
programme.desc: Peppa and George go boating with Grandpa Pig and Polly Parrot, but later Grandpa Pig drops his mobile phone into the water.

programme.title: The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: Let Justice Be done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Monster Machines at the Movies
programme.desc: Grab your popcorn, 'cause it's time for a monster machine movie party! Join Blaze and his family as they watch three movies-a superhero movie, an astronaut movie, and a detective movie-to earn a special surprise reward!

programme.title: Sea Turtle Submarine
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are at the beach when they meet an adorable new friend: Shelly the sea turtle! But when Shelly can't find her way home to the Seaweed Forest, Blaze turns into a Sea Turtle Submarine to help lead the way!

programme.title: The Crew Does A Home Renovation / The Crew Builds A Lighthouse
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Dinosaur Museum / The Crew Builds a Wheelchair Ramp
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: Pups Save the Land Pirates / Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: Pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta, are sent sailing into the desert and got lost! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save these Land pirates. // Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.title: Pups Save a Freaky Pup-Day / Pups Save a Runaway Mayor
programme.desc: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay. // Mayor Humdinger creates robotic Pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so Pups have to save runaway Mayor.

programme.title: Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: Super Dad / Time Out / Cookies
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Tres Leches Trouble / Wizzle Wozzle Woo
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Benny have to trek through the rainforest to deliver a big, delicate tres leches cake to Benny's abuela. // Dora and the Fiesta Trio investigate a loud, strange noise that caused them to lose their instruments.

programme.title: Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: The Carnival
programme.desc: The Carnival has come to town and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting things! There is Mr. Bull's Jazz Band, Miss Rabbit as the Carnival Queen and even a very special appearance from Mr. Potato, showing off his very large balloon!

programme.title: The Ambulance
programme.desc: Dr. Brown Bear comes to visit the playgroup and teach all of the children what to do when there's been an accident.

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: When Tiddles the Tortoise gets stuck in a tree, Pedro Pony has trouble trying to rescue him!

programme.title: Mr. Bull's New Road
programme.desc: Peppa takes Goldie the Goldfish for a visit to the vets and is surprised when she finds that there's a new road to be built over the building!

programme.title: Caves
programme.desc: The family has all gone to the caves for a day out and Grampy Rabbit is their tour guide!

programme.title: Super Potato
programme.desc: Mr. Potato has come to visit the playgroup and he's brought along his superhero friend, Super Potato!

programme.title: Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit saves the day when Grandpa Pig's boat sinks and drives everyone around on his Hovercraft!

programme.title: Robots to the Rescue
programme.desc: When three big emergencies turn out to be too much for one truck alone, Blaze turns himself and his friends into super strong robots to save Axle City from a runaway train, an overflowing glue factory, and an erupting volcano!

programme.title: Pups Save an Elephant Family / Pups and the Mischievous Kittens
programme.desc: The pups' road trip through the savanna becomes a mission to reunite and rescue an elephant family! // To win the Spotless Town award, the PAW Patrol pups must save Adventure Bay from Mayer Humdinger's Kitten Catastrophe Crew!

programme.title: Pups Save a Mud Monster
programme.desc: Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

programme.title: The Crew Raises A Runway / The Crew Builds A Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build // Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: The Crew Plays In The Construction Games
programme.desc: Speed Meister challenges Rubble & Crew to compete in the ultimate build-off: Builder Cove's first Construction Games!

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Hiccupism / Silence please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: The Invasion
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES.

programme.title: Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.desc: When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.desc: It is Grandpa Pig's birthday and the family go out for a special birthday meal. Peppa has never been to a restaurant before.

programme.title: The Petting Farm
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit Mrs Badger's petting farm where they meet lots of little animals and learn it's important to wash your hands.

programme.title: Pizza! Pizza!
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a lot of fun preparing and choosing food to make their own pizzas. Peppa likes making pizzas!

programme.title: TV Land
programme.desc: Peppa and George go behind the scenes to find out how TV is made.

programme.title: Muddy Festival
programme.desc: Peppa and her family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is thrilled!

programme.title: Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.desc: Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.desc: Grab your popcorn, 'cause it's time for a monster machine movie party! Join Blaze and his family as they watch three movies-a superhero movie, an astronaut movie, and a detective movie-to earn a special surprise reward!

programme.desc: A fantasy fire breathing dragon comes to life and won't let Ryder and pups into the Lookout! Paw Patrol takes to the Air Patroller! // The Paw Patrol help three little pigs build new houses after theirs mysteriously disappear.

programme.desc: Skye Kitty gets stuck beside an eagle's nest and needs help getting down.

programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: The Future Is Nigh
programme.desc: Olympia and the team take on a client, Vicki (Yara Martinez), who is fighting to gain full control of an AI afterlife software company she developed with her late sister. Also, Olympia tries to repair her relationship with Sarah and Matty gets a troubling call from Joey.

programme.title: Show of Force
programme.desc: During Edgewater’s Blood Moon Festival, Sheriff Mickey races to stop a suspected serial killer targeting young women. Meanwhile, a shocking discovery propels Deputy Cassidy into the crosshairs of the case.

programme.title: Why Not Now?
programme.desc: A day of celebration at the Edgewater rodeo erupts into chaos after a stampede of runaway horses endangers the crowd.

programme.title: Episode 2
programme.desc: Ria confronts police as she rebuilds with Lee, forcing her to sever ties with Fran. Her return to her former life remains uncertain.

programme.title: Top 10 > 8 (Judges' Song Contest)
programme.desc: Human emotions is at the heart of American Idol, as we watch ordinary people bring their dreams and ambitions to the famous stage. American Idol contunues to be the world’s favourite singing competition!

programme.title: Episode 39
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: Holy K.I.T.T.
programme.desc: Thanksgiving finds Murray (Jeff Garlin) and his brother (guest star Dan Fogler) fighting over their Knight Rider fandom. Beverly (Wendi McLendonCovey) and Bill Lewis (David Koechner) begin a turkey cookoff.

programme.title: Pierce The Vein
programme.desc: Severide probes a suspicious fire at a high school. Novak receives an unexpected call. Violet has a 51 firefighter join her for an ambulance shift.

programme.title: Impulse Control
programme.desc: When a violent breakin occurs, Voight's suspicions lead the team back to a disturbing figure from a past investigation.

programme.title: Episode 15
programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B&B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' daytoday antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Hugh Glass is attacked by a bear and left for dead while on a hunting expedition. Despite unimaginable grief and betrayal by his confidant, he must navigate a vicious winter in a relentless pursuit to live.

programme.title: Episode 17
programme.desc: The critically acclaimed and multiEmmy Awardwinning entrepreneurialthemed reality show returns to spearhead entrepreneurship and inspire a nation to dream bigger.

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of worldclass cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: SURVIVOR 50 goes into uncharted territory and impact the players like never before. For the first time ever, the game is "In the Hands of the Fans"! The players won’t know what the fans voted for until they are competing on the island.

programme.title: Charles Chumbler And Michael Kariakis
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved schoolteacher takes detectives from Kentucky to Florida where an unexpected romance comes to light. As the investigation unfolds, relationships unravel, and a long con born of greed is unveiled.

programme.title: Audition 7
programme.desc: The nation's most beloved talent competition continues with a new set of thrilling acts performing for the judges and the golden opportunity to perform for the Royal Family

programme.title: Gran Turismo: Based On A True Story
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs a workingclass gamer, a former racecar driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: 拜托ATM
